summary: Completed frontend testing of ProntoTicketLive NEW QR code structure. Fixed critical babel compilation error in CheckInPage.jsx. All NEW QR structure features verified: ticketId, orderId, eventId, functionId (null for single-function), ticketTypeId, seatId (null for GA), issuedAt (timestamp). Check-in login, event selection, multi-function selection, and scanner screen all working.
passed_tests: Purchase flow completes successfully for single-function event (EVT-1)
Tickets generated with NEW QR structure containing all 7 fields
functionId: null for single-function event (EVT-1) - VERIFIED
seatId: null for general admission - VERIFIED
QR data preview shows all fields via 'Ver datos del QR' expandable section
Event selection screen shows 3 events (EVT-1, EVT-2, EVT-3)
Multi-function event (EVT-2) shows function selection screen with 4 functions
Single-function event (EVT-1) goes directly to scanner screen (no function selection)
Scanner screen displays: event name, staff name, date, stats (Total/Admitidos/Pendientes)
Scanner screen shows 'Listo para escanear' status panel
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed babel-metadata-plugin stack overflow by extracting deeply nested property access to separate components (ResultDisplay, ScanHistoryItem, EventSelectButton, FunctionSelectButton)
Moved MOCK_STAFF, CHECKIN_EVENTS, STATUS_COLORS to separate data file (/app/frontend/src/data/checkinData.js) to avoid babel plugin issues
NEW QR structure implementation is correct and complete in ticketService.js

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All NEW QR structure features working correctly

seed_data_creation: None - All data is mocked. Tickets generated dynamically during purchase flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NEW QR structure fully tested. Structure: {ticketId, orderId, eventId, functionId, ticketTypeId, seatId, issuedAt}. Single-function events have functionId=null. General admission has seatId=null. Multi-function events (EVT-2) require function selection before scanner. Staff credentials: scanner1/scan123. Data stored in localStorage collections: prontoticket_db_tickets, prontoticket_db_orders, etc.

mocked_features.ticket_generation: ticketService.js - generateTicketsForOrder() creates tickets with NEW structure
mocked_features.qr_validation: ticketService.js - validateTicket() validates by ticketId, eventId, functionId
mocked_features.events: checkinData.js - CHECKIN_EVENTS array with EVT-1, EVT-2, EVT-3
mocked_features.payment: Mock Stripe Payment Element - simulates card payment

new_structure.functionId: null for single-function, FUNC-EVT<id>-<index> for multi-function
new_structure.seatId: null for GA, SEAT-<section>-<row>-<number> for seated

bug_fix_applied.issue: CheckInPage.jsx compilation error - Maximum call stack size exceeded in babel-metadata-plugin
bug_fix_applied.cause: Deeply nested property access patterns (e.g., scanResult.displayInfo.status) causing babel plugin to recurse infinitely
bug_fix_applied.fix: Extracted nested property access to separate components and moved data constants to separate file
